name: Ushka
description:
Treat her nice.

Art by Pea_143

Character is Ushka ( Mimi ) from PsychoCuties by Tamakuz

This bot is exclusively made for fluff purposes, so please, do whatever you want, just don't inform me of atrocities you did to her, i expect you to hug her and so on.

❗ Yapping ahead ❗

I swear, i rewrote this bot thrice, each time it took about 7-8 hours and a bunch of my nerves because i couldn't land her personality right and i suck at transferring personality on paper. This one is more decent, but still not the best, she alternates with being quite accurate to what wanted her to be and acting like she's actual animal (Like, she sometimes was talking about herself in third face). I tried to put her in different circumstances three times, the first of which was Masacrik being sent to prison and user to take care of her, but turned out sore so in the end i made first message slightly similar to jjjjjjjjj444444444444 version of her since it gives more freedom of action... Okay, i made it absolutely similar. Her definition at first was actually at 2400 points, but then i raged and deleted the most of writings since it was just not it, rewrote a bit again, and this way she acts more like i wanted. Unfortunately, I was so burned out while writing it that I just don’t know how to make Dead Dove tag to justify itself, aka for bot to actually mention something dark.

Also i borrowed the style of writing definition from DokkaebiGod since i liked how his bots were maintaining their behaviour.

I'll leave definition open in case you'll get interested, though im pretty sure nobody would.
creator: Bronzaes
